---
title: "histogram_match_apply"
generated: true
description: "Remap `source` onto fitted reference `landmarks`."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.bias`](../nitrix-bias.qmd)

*Re-exported here; defined in `nitrix.bias._histogram_match`.*

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:histogram_match_apply -->
```python
histogram_match_apply(source: Float[Array, '*spatial'], landmarks: Float[Array, ' landmarks'], *, source_weight: Optional[Float[Array, '*spatial']] = None, n_match_points: int = 7, n_histogram_levels: int = 1024, threshold_at_mean: bool = True) -> Float[Array, '*spatial']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:histogram_match_apply -->
Remap `source` onto fitted reference `landmarks`.

The *apply* half of the two-phase workflow: derive `source`'s own
landmarks (source-specific -- they cannot be precomputed) and map its
intensities through the piecewise-linear interpolant from the source
landmarks to the fitted reference `landmarks` (the output of
[`histogram_match_fit`](../nitrix-bias/histogram_match_fit.qmd)).
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:histogram_match_apply -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `source` | `Float` | `*spatial` | — | Image to remap, `(*spatial)`. |
| `landmarks` | `Float` | `landmarks` | — | The fitted reference landmark vector from [`histogram_match_fit`](../nitrix-bias/histogram_match_fit.qmd) (the standard scale). |
| `source_weight` | `Optional[Float[Array, '*spatial']]` | — | `None` | Optional mask / confidence for the source histogram (see [`histogram_match`](../nitrix-bias/histogram_match.qmd)); overrides `threshold_at_mean` on the source side. |
| `n_match_points` | `int` | — | `7` | Must match the values passed to [`histogram_match_fit`](../nitrix-bias/histogram_match_fit.qmd) (the source landmark structure has to mirror the reference's). |
| `n_histogram_levels` | `int` | — | `1024` | Must match the values passed to [`histogram_match_fit`](../nitrix-bias/histogram_match_fit.qmd) (the source landmark structure has to mirror the reference's). |
| `threshold_at_mean` | `bool` | — | `True` | Must match the values passed to [`histogram_match_fit`](../nitrix-bias/histogram_match_fit.qmd) (the source landmark structure has to mirror the reference's). |

**Returns** `Float` — shape `*spatial`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen sections:histogram_match_apply -->
::: {.callout-note}
Differentiability is unchanged from [`histogram_match`](../nitrix-bias/histogram_match.qmd): the
landmark search is non-differentiable; gradients flow through the
`jnp.interp` apply via the reference `landmarks`.
:::
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:histogram_match_apply -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `*spatial` | the spatial axes of a grid (variadic) |
| `landmarks` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
